title: Satu Barang, Banyak Tanya
theme: Mengungkap kecemasan tersembunyi seseorang saat berhadapan dengan situasi rutin yang berubah janggal, memicu pertanyaan tentang bahaya di sekitar kita.

cover.prompt: A quiet street scene illuminated by warm streetlights, with a small minimarket at the end of a narrow pathway. Soft glow reflects off wet pavement after a gentle rain, creating a peaceful yet slightly melancholic atmosphere. The scene captures the stillness of late evening, with subtle hints of everyday life—like a lone bicycle leaning against a storefront or steam rising from a bowl of instant noodles on a window sill. Emphasize depth with layered elements and atmospheric lighting, avoiding any focus on faces or sensitive details.
cover.style: Cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, warm color grading

meta.plan_summary: A young worker's late-night minimarket run turns unsettling when the cashier's overly personal questions and strange behavior, coupled with a mysterious code, ignite a growing paranoia, leaving them questioning reality and potential danger.
